patches_added.name: Repurpose Search/Games tabs to Tools/About
patches_added.description: Redirects the Search tab to the Modx Tools screen and the Games tab to the Modx About screen.

patches_removed.name: Redirect avatar click to Settings
patches_removed.description: Makes the top-right avatar open Settings directly instead of the Me/Profile tab.

patches_modified.name: Enable Prime membership
patches_modified.description: Enables app features locked behind the subscription paywall.

patches_added.name: Downloads
patches_added.description: Adds support to download songs with an external downloader app using the in-app download button.

patches_added.name: Hide filter bar
patches_added.description: Adds an option to hide the filter bar at the top of the homepage.

patches_added.name: Hide flyout menu components
patches_added.description: Adds options to hide individual items from the player and queue flyout menus.

patches_added.name: Hide layout components
patches_added.description: Adds options to hide general layout components.

patches_added.name: Hide music action buttons
patches_added.description: Adds options to hide action buttons under the player.

patches_removed.name: Hide category bar
patches_removed.description: Adds an option to hide the category bar at the top of the homepage.

patches_removed.name: Hide music video ads
patches_removed.description: Adds an option to hide ads that appear while listening to or streaming music videos, podcasts, or songs.

patches_modified.name: Hide ads
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide fullscreen ads, Premium promotions and video ads.

patches_removed.name: Video ads
patches_removed.description: Adds an option to remove ads in the video player.

patches_modified.name: Hide ads
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide general ads, Premium promotions and video ads.

patches_modified.name: Custom branding name for Reddit
patches_modified.description: Changes the Reddit app name to the name specified in patch options.

patches_modified.name: Disable modern home
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable the modern home UI. This patch works with Reddit 2026.24.0 and earlier.

patches_modified.name: Disable screenshot popup
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable the popup that appears when taking a screenshot.

patches_modified.name: Hide Ask button
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide Ask button in the search bar.

patches_modified.name: Hide Reddit search
patches_modified.description: Permanently hides the Reddit search in the contextual menu. This patch does not work with root mounting

patches_modified.name: Hide Trending shelves
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide the Trending shelves from feed and search suggestions.

patches_modified.name: Hide communities shelf
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide the related or suggested communities shelf in subreddits.

patches_modified.name: Hide navigation buttons
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide buttons in the navigation bar.

patches_modified.name: Hide sidebar components
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide the sidebar components.

patches_modified.name: Open links directly
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to skip over redirection URLs in external links.

patches_modified.name: Open links externally
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to always open links in your browser instead of with the in-app-browser.

patches_modified.name: Remove subreddit dialog
patches_modified.description: Adds options to remove the NSFW community warning and notifications suggestion dialogs by dismissing them automatically.

patches_modified.name: Sanitize sharing links
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to sanitize sharing links by removing tracking query parameters.

patches_modified.name: Show view count
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to show the view count of Posts.

patches_modified.name: Spoof signature
patches_modified.description: Spoofs the signature of the app to fix notification issues.
